---
description: Add an MCP-backed moment to the demo when tools are available.
---

Use available MCP tools to add one external/tool-backed moment to the release decision.

Examples:

- GitHub MCP: inspect or create a release-blocker issue
- Microsoft Learn MCP: verify official guidance relevant to the scenario
- Playwright MCP: validate a UI flow in a companion app
- Azure MCP: inspect deployment or resource context

If no relevant MCP tools are available, explain which tool would fit and continue with local evidence.
